text: - (d) Subcontractor  understands  and  agrees  to  comply  with  the  terms  and  conditions  of  the  general National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System (NPDES) permit   as applicable, or similar state permits if not in Louisiana and/or local variants thereof that authorize storm water discharges associated with industrial activity from the  Project  site.  Subcontractor  shall  comply  with  the  Stormwater  Prevention  Plan  for  the  Project  and  shall indemnify,  defend  and  hold  Contractor  harmless  of  and  from  any  and  all  claims  asserted  against  Contractor attributable  to  Subcontractor's  acts  or  omissions  with  regard  to  the  Stormwater  Prevention  Plan  or  the  NPDES permit  or other state variants or local variants thereof. If any such act or omission results in the assessment of a civil  penalty  or  fine  against  Contractor,  Subcontractor  shall  reimburse  Contractor  the  amount  paid  therefor  by Contractor on demand of Contractor and Contractor shall have the right to offset such amounts against payments then or thereafter due Subcontractor under this Subcontract or any other agreement with Contractor.
